body_excerpt: In updateInputChannel of WindowManagerService.java, there is a possible way to set a touchable region beyond its own SurfaceControl due to a logic error in the code. This could lead to local denial of service with no additional execution privileges needed. User interaction is not needed for exploitation.

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足
